fields.summary: Centralize queue resource calculation based on CapacityVectors

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

issuetype.description: An improvement or enhancement to an existing feature or task.
issuetype.name: Improvement

fields.description: With the introduction of YARN-10930 it is possible to unify queue resource calculation. In order to narrow down the scope of this patch, the base system is implemented here, without refactoring the existing resource calculation in updateClusterResource (which will be done in YARN-11000).

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed

fields.summary: [Umbrella] Extract and refactor queue resource calculation + Add a generic way to explain calculations in the logs

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
status.name: Open
